title: prunus spinosa var. parviflora
intro: Prunus spinosa var. parviflora, also known as dwarf sloe or small sloe, is a variety of Prunus spinosa, a deciduous shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prunus spinosa var. parviflora include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Prunus spinosa var. parviflora include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
